title: austrobassia costata
intro: Austrobassia costata, also known as the 'Queensland kauri pine', is a species of coniferous tree native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Austrobassia costata include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating rheumatism, as well as exhibiting antiseptic and antifungal properties. Austrobassia costata is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, although the availability and usage of this plant may vary due to conservation efforts.
